column5:
Help hub page.

Key headings: How can we help?
Layout: Search bar at top. Three section cards: Help Centre, Submit a Request, Developers.
Each card has a headline, one-line description and a CTA button.

CTAs: Browse Help Centre / Submit a Request / View API Docs.
Internal links: /help/centre, /help/submit-request, /help/developers.

column5:
Submit a Request form.

Key headings: Submit a request.
Fields: Name, email, account details, issue type (Platform, Carrier, Billing, Onboarding, Other), description, file attachment.
Response time SLA displayed on page.
Alternative: Live chat if available.

CTA: Submit Request.
Internal links: /help.

column5:
Developer resources section.

Key headings: Developer resources.
Key links: API Documentation, API Reference, Status Page, Changelog.
Covers all Connexx API endpoints for shipment creation, label generation, tracking, carrier management and customs.
Under 200ms average response time.

CTAs: View API Docs / API Reference / Status Page.
Internal links: /connexx#api.
